name: Greek Rice Pudding

ingredients.item: 1/2 tablespoons cornstarch mixed with 2 tablespoons milk

method: Combine water, rice and cinnamon stick in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
Lower the heat and simmer covered for 16 minutes.
Add the sugar, milk and cornstarch mixture to the pan.
Increase the heat to moderate and constantly stir 16 minutes, until the mixture thickens.
Add vanilla extract, lemon zest, and nutmeg and stir to combine.
Spoon into individual glasses or serving bowls and refrigerate for at least 3 hours.
Dust with a little cinnamon before serving.
